seo.title: Hagopart Barbershop | Master Cuts in Glendale, CA
seo.description: Precision grooming and classic barbering in the heart of Glendale. Expert fades, hot towel shaves, and beard trims. Walk-ins welcome 7 days a week.

hero.heading: Master Cuts. Timeless Style.
hero.subheading: Precision grooming and classic barbering in the heart of Glendale. Where every cut is a craft.

about.heading: The Hagopart Experience
paragraphs: At Hagopart Barbershop, we believe every haircut tells a story. Located in Suite 201 on South Glendale Avenue, our shop blends old-world barbering traditions with modern techniques to deliver cuts that are sharp, clean, and uniquely you.

Whether you're after a classic fade, a straight razor shave, or a complete grooming session, our skilled barbers take the time to understand your style and deliver results that exceed expectations. Walk-ins welcome, seven days a week.

services.title: Classic Haircut
services.description: Precision cut with hot towel finish and styling. Tailored to your face shape and personal style.

services.title: Beard Trim & Shape
services.description: Expert beard grooming with razor-sharp lines, hot towel treatment, and conditioning oil.

services.title: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Traditional straight razor shave with warm lather, hot towels, and aftershave balm.

services.title: Kids Cut
services.description: Patient, friendly cuts for the little ones. Clean and stylish results every time.

services.title: Fade & Taper
services.description: Skin fades, drop fades, and tapers executed with surgical precision. Crisp lines guaranteed.

services.title: Full Grooming Package
services.description: Haircut, beard trim, hot towel shave, and eyebrow cleanup. The complete gentleman's experience.

reviews.text: Best barbershop in Glendale, hands down. The attention to detail is incredible — every fade is perfect.
reviews.author: Armen K.

reviews.text: I've been coming here for months and have never been disappointed. The vibe is great and the cuts are always on point.
reviews.author: David M.

reviews.text: Finally found a barber who actually listens. My lineup has never looked this clean. Highly recommend Hagopart.
reviews.author: Tony R.

contact.address: 1111 S Glendale Ave, Suite 201, Glendale, CA 91205
